remarks: Experience refined luxury living at The Classic, one of downtown Stamford's most prestigious high-rise residences. This fully remodeled 1BR 1BA condominium blends sophisticated design with exceptional convenience, creating the perfect urban retreat. The elegant doorman building welcomes residents with a beautifully appointed lobby. Inside, the sun-drenched unit showcases brand-new designer flooring, crown molding, designer finishes, and an inviting open-concept living and dining area that extends seamlessly to a private balcony. The stunning chef-inspired kitchen has been thoughtfully reimagined with quartz countertops, gray shaker cabinetry, premium stainless steel appliances, a stylish tile backsplash, gas cooking, and breakfast bar seating. The spacious primary bedroom offers private balcony access, a generous walk-in closett, while the beautifully updated bath features a storage vanity and tub/shower combination. Residents enjoy an impressive collection of resort-style amenities, including a rooftop indoor pool, fitness center, resident lounge, rooftop terrace with sweeping city views, and an outdoor dog park with grilling areas. Complete with in-unit laundry, garage parking, gas cooking, and hot water included in the common charges. Step outside and enjoy one of Stamford's most walkable locations, just moments from acclaimed restaurants, vibrant nightlife, theaters, parks, and Metro-North, placing the very best of downtown living right at your doorstep.
